## 1. Launch Post (Sun Jun 14)

> Big news. On Sun Jun 21 we kick off a 15-day challenge, and by Sun Jul 5 you will have built your first AI marketing agent.
>
> Here is what that means: an agent that every morning hands you a fresh content idea for your business, plus a ready-to-run prompt to make it. No more staring at a blank screen wondering what to post.
>
> 30 minutes a day. Free with your membership. And there is $1,000 in credits on the line for the best agents.
>
> Doors are open now and close Sat Jun 20. Grab your spot: <https://TEAM-TO-ADD/registration>
>
> Drop a fire emoji if you are in.
> Matt

## 2. Doors-Closing Post (Sat Jun 20)

> Last call. Registration for the Build Your First AI Marketing Agent challenge closes tonight at 11:59pm SGT.
>
> If you post less than you would like because you never know what to say, this is the fix. 15 days, 30 minutes a day, and you walk away with an agent that hands you the idea every morning.
>
> <https://TEAM-TO-ADD/registration>
> Matt

## 3. Day 1 Kickoff Post (Sun Jun 21)

> We are live. Day 1 starts now.
>
> Today is easy: create your Claude Project, and say hello in #Day1 with what you sell. 10 minutes.
>
> By Jul 5 you will have a working agent. On Jul 8 (the Summit) we crown the winners and give away $1,000 in credits. Let us build.
> Matt
